2603.11114.title: Task-Conditioned Routing Signatures in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Transformers
2603.11114.paper_summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures enable efficient scaling of large language models through conditional computation, yet the routing mechanisms responsible for expert selection remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce routing signatures, a vector representation summarizing expert activation patterns across layers for a given prompt, and use them to study whether MoE routing exhibits task-conditioned structure. Using OLMoE-1B-7B-0125-Instruct as an empirical testbed, we show that prompts from the same task category induce highly similar routing signatures, while prompts from different categories exhibit substantially lower similarity. Within-category routing similarity (0.8435 +/- 0.0879) significantly exceeds across-category similarity (0.6225 +/- 0.1687), corresponding to Cohen's d = 1.44. A logistic regression classifier trained solely on routing signatures achieves 92.5% +/- 6.1% cross-validated accuracy on four-way task classification. To ensure statistical validity, we introduce permutation and load-balancing baselines and show that the observed separation is not explained by sparsity or balancing constraints alone. We further analyze layer-wise signal strength and low-dimensional projections of routing signatures, finding that task structure becomes increasingly apparent in deeper layers. These results suggest that routing in sparse transformers is not merely a balancing mechanism, but a measurable task-sensitive component of conditional computation. We release MOE-XRAY, a lightweight toolkit for routing telemetry and analysis.
2603.11114.paper_summary_zh: 稀疏專家混合（MoE）架構通過條件計算實現大型語言模型的高效擴展，但負責專家選擇的路由機制仍然不甚了解。<lb/>在本研究中，我們引入了路由簽名，這是一種向量表示，總結了針對給定提示的專家激活模式，並利用它們來研究MoE路由是否顯示出任務條件結構。<lb/>以OLMoE-1B-7B-0125-Instruct作為實證測試平台，我們顯示來自同一任務類別的提示會產生高度相似的路由簽名，而來自不同類別的提示則表現出顯著較低的相似性。<lb/>類別內路由相似性（0.8435 +/- 0.0879）顯著超過類別間相似性（0.6225 +/- 0.1687），對應於Cohen's d = 1.44。<lb/>僅基於路由簽名訓練的邏輯回歸分類器在四路任務分類上達到了92.5% +/- 6.1%的交叉驗證準確率。<lb/>為了確保統計有效性，我們引入了置換和負載平衡基準，並顯示觀察到的分離並非僅由稀疏性或平衡約束解釋。<lb/>我們進一步分析了層級信號強度和路由簽名的低維投影，發現任務結構在更深的層次中變得越來越明顯。<lb/>這些結果表明，稀疏Transformer中的路由不僅僅是一種平衡機制，而是條件計算中可測量的任務敏感組件。<lb/>我們發布了MOE-XRAY，一個輕量級的路由遙測和分析工具包。
2603.11114.author: Mynampati Sri Ranganadha Avinash et.al.
